        - Then it has detailed paragraphs for each category, matching the structure of previous games.
        - Ends with a comprehensive score: `综合评分： 84.9` and a concluding paragraph.
        - This page is clearly the continuation/conclusion of the 《阴阳师》 analysis (10.17). The previous tree already has 10.17.1 to 10.17.5. So page 28 doesn't introduce a new main section, it just finishes 10.17.

        - This indicates a new section: `《鸣潮》基础数据` (Wuthering Waves Basic Data).

            - So `《鸣潮》基础数据` should be `10.18`.
        - The text on page 29 contains charts/data descriptions for 《鸣潮》 (Wuthering Waves), like revenue, retention, user demographics, and a brief analysis paragraph.
        - It doesn't explicitly show the "测评分析" (Evaluation Analysis) section yet, but based on the pattern, it will be `10.19` later. For now, I only need to extract what's present in the text.
